description: A large horizontal abstract painting divided into two halves. The left half is pale blue, the right half is pale cream or white. Across both halves, small cross-shaped or plus-sign forms are scattered in various colors — white, black, dark blue, red, and pink. Some forms appear as simple intersecting lines. A small dark angular shape sits at the lower left of the blue section. The overall composition is spare and geometric with delicate line work.
